nodes.label: AI as communication and content creation tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as unreliable for artistic execution
nodes.grounding_span: generating emails or quotes for jobs, and developing social media and advertising content

nodes.label: AI as project planning and idea generation aid
nodes.label_negative: AI suggestions impractical due to spatial constraints
nodes.grounding_span: come up with unique ideas for projects

nodes.label: AI accuracy in product and measurement suggestions
nodes.label_negative: AI inaccuracy in measurements and placement
nodes.grounding_span: accuracy issues when searching for products

nodes.label: AI as collaborative partner
nodes.grounding_span: I am more inclined to collaborate throughout the task

nodes.label: Human artistic touch and experience
nodes.grounding_span: the human element is key to creating a beautiful finish

nodes.label: Creative problem-solving and client satisfaction
nodes.grounding_span: AI found a solution that was functionally perfect and gave me the assistance I needed

nodes.label: Artistic integrity and personal craftsmanship
nodes.grounding_span: experience using various techniques, products, and colors cannot be replaced

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI as time-saver and enhancer
nodes.grounding_span: AI only enhances my work, often making it less time consuming

nodes.label: Frustration with AI inaccuracy in spatial constraints
nodes.grounding_span: the suggestion was ultimately useless because the placement of the window and roofline made its completion impossible

nodes.label: Optimism about future AI improvements in accuracy
nodes.grounding_span: I have no doubt that accuracy in this type of situation will improve in the future

nodes.label: Confidence in irreplaceability of human artistic touch
nodes.grounding_span: there are aspects of my job that I believe will always require a human touch

nodes.label: Collaborative iterative refinement — back-and-forth editing with AI
nodes.grounding_span: have AI generate a first draft, then edit to add my own personal touch and have AI check it over for me

nodes.label: Domain-based selective trust — clear boundaries between AI-helpful and human-essential tasks
nodes.grounding_span: for project planning and content creation for social media and communication with clients, AI is superb, but as far as achieving the final product, that can't be replaced by AI
